description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 23 hrs 30 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 1 min. His activity was split across Java, Other, and Markdown. The data does not list any public GitHub repositories, pull requests, or new repos this week.
